Free Estimate
Home / Services

Complete Pest Control
Services

No pest is too tough for Sasquatch. We offer the full spectrum of pest control solutions for Upstate New York homes and businesses.

01
🐜

Ant Control

Carpenter ants are the #1 structural pest in Upstate NY, silently hollowing out wood in walls, floors, and joists. We find the colony, eliminate it at the source, and seal every entry point.

  • Carpenter ant colony elimination
  • Pavement & odorous house ants
  • Interior and exterior barrier treatments
  • Entry point identification & sealing
Get Free Estimate
02
🐭

Rodent Control

Mice and rats enter Upstate NY homes in droves as temperatures drop. They chew wiring, contaminate food, and spread disease. We deploy tamper-resistant trapping systems and preventive sealing.

  • Mice, Norway rats & roof rats
  • Tamper-resistant bait stations
  • Full exclusion & gap sealing
  • Attic, crawlspace & garage treatment
Get Free Estimate
03
🛏️

Bed Bug Treatment

Bed bugs spread fast, hide in the tiniest cracks, and survive months without feeding. We offer heat treatment (kills all life stages) and chemical solutions for complex infestations.

  • Heat treatment (kills eggs & adults)
  • Chemical treatment protocols
  • Hotel, rental & residential
  • Post-treatment monitoring
Get Free Estimate
04
🦟

Mosquito Control

In Upstate NY, mosquitoes are vectors for West Nile and EEE. Our seasonal barrier spray programs dramatically reduce populations, letting your family reclaim the backyard all summer.

  • Seasonal barrier spray programs
  • Standing water treatment
  • Backyard & event property treatment
  • Natural/organic options available
Get Free Estimate
05
🏠

Termite Inspection & Treatment

Subterranean termites cause billions in damage and work silently for years. Our certified inspections catch them early, and our Termidor and bait system treatments stop them cold.

  • Certified WDI inspections
  • Termidor liquid treatments
  • Baiting station systems
  • Annual inspection plans
Get Free Estimate
06
🦝

Wildlife Removal

Raccoons, skunks, squirrels, groundhogs — Upstate NY wildlife is bold. We use humane live trapping, exclusion, and entry-point sealing so animals don't come back.

  • Raccoons, skunks & groundhogs
  • Squirrels & opossums
  • Humane live trapping
  • Exclusion & damage repair
Get Free Estimate
07
🐝

Wasp & Bee Removal

Yellowjackets and bald-faced hornets are among Upstate NY's most aggressive stinging insects. We safely remove nests and treat areas to prevent re-nesting.

  • Yellowjackets & bald-faced hornets
  • Paper wasps & mud daubers
  • Bee hive relocation when possible
  • Underground burrow treatment
Get Free Estimate
08
🕷️

Tick & Flea Treatment

Lyme disease from deer ticks is a real health threat across Upstate NY. Our yard spray programs reduce tick populations, and we treat indoor flea infestations with IGR products that break the life cycle.

  • Deer tick / blacklegged tick control
  • Dog tick yard sprays
  • Indoor flea treatments
  • Pet-safe treatment options
Get Free Estimate
Ongoing Protection

Prevention Plans

The most cost-effective way to stay pest-free year-round. Choose the plan that fits your home.

Quarterly
4 Visits Per Year
Baseline coverage for common pests each season.
  • ✓ Seasonal exterior treatment
  • ✓ Interior spot treatment as needed
  • ✓ Covers ants, spiders, wasps, mice
  • ✓ Free re-treatment between visits
  • ✓ Annual pest inspection report
Get This Plan
Most Popular
Bi-Monthly
6 Visits Per Year
Best balance of coverage and value for Upstate NY.
  • ✓ Everything in Quarterly
  • ✓ Mosquito barrier spray (seasonal)
  • ✓ Tick control included
  • ✓ Priority scheduling
  • ✓ Rodent monitoring stations
  • ✓ 15% discount on extra services
Get This Plan
Monthly
12 Visits Per Year
Ultimate protection for larger properties and landlords.
  • ✓ Everything in Bi-Monthly
  • ✓ Monthly interior inspection
  • ✓ Termite monitoring included
  • ✓ Wildlife exclusion checks
  • ✓ Same-day emergency visits
  • ✓ 25% discount on extra services
Get This Plan

All Estimates Are Free

Not sure which service you need? We'll come out, inspect, and tell you exactly what you're dealing with — at no charge.
